name: Project Manager
keyword: Project Manager, Product Owner, Scrum Master

cv_data.raw_text:
PURVA KALE
Mob: +919172316063 |Email : purva.pilot57@gmail.com
SUMMARY
Project Manager with experience leading end to end project management, project delivery and PMO
operations. Experienced in leading global teams, managing stakeholders, process improvement and ensuring
delivery excellence. Focused on aligning technology with strategic business goals to drive impactful, on-time
and scalable project outcomes.
EDUCATION
Master of Engineering in E&TC (Signal Processing) 2014 - 2016
PES Modern College of Engineering,Pune
Bachelor of Engineering in E&TC 2010 - 2014
Sinhgad Institutes SKNCOE, Pune
Skills: Project Management, Jira, Confluence, Service Now, Stakeholder Management, SDLC, DevOps,
Digital Transformation, Prompt Engineering, Generative AI, Agile Methodology, Scrum, Kanban
Certifications: Project Management (IIT Delhi), Agile Project management and Project Delivery,
Scrum master, Prompt Engineering and GenAI
Languages: English, Marathi, Hindi
WORK EXPERIENCE
Project Manager, IT PMO: Worldline Global March 2023 - Present
Led end-to-end delivery of IT projects across production services and cloud platforms, ensuring
alignment with business goals, technical requirements, and compliance standards.
Managed cross-functional Agile teams using Scrum and Kanban; provided Agile coaching to enhance
delivery efficiency and team collaboration across global locations.
Utilized JIRA and Confluence for project planning, tracking, and documentation; oversaw project
scope, budget, risk management (GRC), and knowledge sharing.
Coordinated with stakeholders, developers, and infrastructure teams across the UK, Europe, and India
to ensure effective communication and timely execution throughout the SDLC.
Oversaw incident and change management processes via ServiceNow and implemented IT process
improvements to reduce downtime, optimize operations, and improve system reliability.
Project Manager,IT PMO: Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Co. Ltd. Apr 2022 - Present
Managed end-to-end software and application development projects using SDLC, Agile (Scrum),
DevOps, and Waterfall methodologies, delivering scalable, high-quality solutions aligned with
stakeholder requirements and business objectives.
Drove digital transformation initiatives, ensuring business readiness through stakeholder engagement,
customer communication plans, end-user training, and post-launch support.
Partnered with business and technical teams to define project scope, deliverables, resource allocation,
and task prioritization; led risk identification, impact analysis, and mitigation planning.
Ensured timely project execution by tracking milestones through daily stand-ups and performance
monitoring using tools such as JIRA and SmartOne.
Led talent development programs including Agile coaching, upskilling, and reskilling initiatives in
partnership with Coursera, aligning with organizational learning and development strategies.
Project Manager : Global Talent Track Sept 2021- Mar 2022
Delivered end-to-end software development and CSR projects in collaboration with Barclays,
managing scope, schedule, resources, and quality from planning to final release.
Applied Agile, Scrum, and Waterfall methodologies to execute complex projects efficiently, ensuring
alignment with business objectives and stakeholder expectations.
Oversaw cross-functional teams of coordinators and trainers; conducted daily stand-ups, tracked
performance, and resolved issues to drive smooth delivery and operational excellence.
Led inclusive mobilization initiatives across diverse groups—freelancers, underprivileged youth, lgbtq
individuals, and return-to-work professionals—enhancing project impact and reach.
Developed project plans, performance reports, and onboarding content while leading upskilling,
reskilling, and Agile coaching programs to support organizational learning goals.
Project Manager: NYCS India Jun 2017 - Sept 2021
Managed high-impact CSR and software development projects under the leadership of the Director,
NYCS India, and BJP Maharashtra’s General State Secretary.
Delivered end-to-end projects using Agile and Waterfall methodologies, ensuring timely, high-quality
execution in collaboration with cross-functional teams.
Managed stakeholder engagement and operations across skill development centers in Maharashtra,
impacting over 3,000 students through scalable project delivery.
Coordinated with the National Skill Development Corporation of India to implement RPL (Recognition
of Prior Learning) programs and post-assessment certification processes.
Achieved a 10x increase in student assessments—from 300 to 3,000—through strategic planning,
mobilization efforts, and continuous monitoring of project performance.
